entities.name: Rubedo Life Sciences
entities.description: Desenvolve senoliticos de precisao baseados em modulacao de GPX4/ferroptose. Primeiro paciente dosado em Phase 1 com RLS-1496 em junho 2025.
entities.catalyst: Resultados Phase 1 de RLS-1496 e expansao para formulacoes sistemicas

entities.name: Eos SENOLYTIX
entities.description: Senoliticos baseados em peptideos MitoXcel que targetam mitocondria de celulas senescentes. Lead candidate PTC-2105 mostrou 34% reducao de massa gorda em ratos.
entities.catalyst: Primeiro ensaio clinico em humanos planeado para 2026

entities.name: Life Biosciences
entities.description: Primeiro trial clinico de reprogramacao epigenetica parcial com ER-100. FDA clearance para IND em Q1 2026, tratando neuropatias opticas.
entities.catalyst: Primeiro trial humano de reprogramacao celular em curso

entities.name: NewLimit
entities.description: Reprogramacao epigenetica focada em figado e sistema imunitario. Financiada por Brian Armstrong (Coinbase). Investimento de Eli Lilly.
entities.catalyst: Terapia clinic-ready para hepatocitos, estudos IND-enabling em curso

entities.name: Retro Biosciences
entities.description: Autophagy enhancement e reprogramacao de celulas estaminais. Trial humano com RTR242 para Alzheimer. Parceria com OpenAI aumentou eficiencia de reprogramacao 50x.
entities.catalyst: Resultados de trials humanos com RTR242

entities.name: Altos Labs
entities.description: Maior financiamento de startup biotech de sempre ($3B). Foco em rejuvenescimento celular com factores Yamanaka. Safety testing iniciado agosto 2025.

entities.name: Structure Therapeutics
entities.description: Oral GLP-1 aleniglipron em Phase 2 com 11%+ perda de peso. FDA meeting para Phase 3 planeado para 2026.

entities.name: Viking Therapeutics
entities.description: Dual GLP-1/GIP agonist VK2735. Phase 3 VANQUISH-1 enrollment completo (4650 pacientes). Oral e subcutaneo.
entities.catalyst: Phase 3 VANQUISH topline data, potencial M&A target
entities.red_flags: Stock volatil, 28% dropout em oral trial, all-or-nothing bet

entities.name: eGenesis
entities.description: Xenotransplantacao com porcos 69-gene edited. FDA IND clearance para EGEN-2784 (rim). Kidney funcionou 271 dias em humano.
entities.catalyst: Phase 1/2/3 trial em ESKD em curso

entities.name: United Therapeutics
entities.description: UKidney (10-gene edited pig kidney) em trial EXPAND. Potencial de 50 pacientes para BLA submission.
entities.red_flags: Pipeline diversificado dilui exposicao a xeno

entities.name: Insilico Medicine
entities.description: AI drug discovery com 28 drugs em pipeline. Deal de $2.75B com Eli Lilly. IPO Hong Kong dez 2025 ($293M).
entities.catalyst: Phase 2 readouts multiplos, Lilly partnership execution
entities.red_flags: Mercado HK menos liquido, execucao de partnership

entities.name: BioAge Labs
entities.description: NLRP3 inhibitor BGE-102 em Phase 1. Descontinuou azelaprag. BGE-102 mostra weight loss comparavel a semaglutide em preclinico.
entities.catalyst: Phase 1 BGE-102 topline data, Phase 1b/2a POC em obesidade

entities.name: TruDiagnostic
entities.description: Leader em testes epigeneticos de idade biologica. DunedinPACE, 1700+ biomarkers. Usado por Bryan Johnson e Rejuvenation Olympics.

entities.name: Loyal
entities.description: First FDA-approved lifespan extension drug (canine). LOY-002 com TAS acceptance. STAY trial (1300 dogs) maior veterinary trial de sempre.

entities.name: Juvena Therapeutics
entities.description: JUV-161 em Phase 1 para sarcopenia e DM1. Parceria com Lilly ($650M potencial). Proteina regeneradora muscular first-in-class.
entities.catalyst: Phase 1 completion janeiro 2026, Lilly partnership expansion

entities.name: Cyclarity Therapeutics
entities.description: UDP-003 cyclodextrin para remover 7-ketocholesterol. Phase 1 em Australia, inclui 12 ACS patients. Innovation Passport UK.

entities.name: Cambrian Biopharma
entities.description: Portfolio de longevity treatments em Phase 2. Foco em inflamacao cronica e fibrose. Modelo distribuido com multiplos programas.

entities.name: Oisin Biotechnologies
entities.description: Gene therapy senolitica com platforma proteo-lipid. Phase 1 em cardiovascular aging. Backing de AbbVie Ventures.

entities.name: Cleara Biotech
entities.description: FOXO4-DRI senolitico baseado em peptideos. CL04183 development candidate com 29% survival increase em geriatric mice.
entities.catalyst: Pre-IND studies em curso, potencial first-in-human

entities.name: Metro International Biotech
entities.description: NAD+ pharma com MIB-626 em trials para Alzheimer. MIB-725 em Phase 1. Fundada por David Sinclair.
entities.catalyst: MIB-725 Phase 1 data, MIB-626 Alzheimer trial results
entities.red_flags: NAD+ field controverso, David Sinclair polarizante

entities.name: Genflow Biosciences

entities.name: Cellvie
entities.description: Mitochondria transplantation therapy. Lead program em kidney transplantation. Phase 1/2a planeado apos financing.

entities.name: Shift Bioscience
entities.description: AI virtual cell platform. Descoberta de SB000 gene que rejuvenesce 3-10 anos por mes. Evita pluripotency risks.

entities.name: Aeovian Pharmaceuticals
entities.description: Selective mTORC1 inhibitor AV078 em Phase 2 para TSC epilepsy. Foco em aging-related metabolic dysfunction.
entities.catalyst: Phase 2 POC data em TSC epilepsy

entities.name: Vaxxinity

entities.name: Rejuvenate Bio

entities.name: Elevian
entities.description: GDF11 recombinante para stroke e aging diseases. Dados preclinicos fortes em neovascularizacao e neurogenese.

entities.name: YouthBio Therapeutics
entities.description: Gene therapy YB002 para Alzheimer. INTERACT meeting positivo com FDA em setembro 2025.

entities.name: Turn.bio

entities.red_flags: Foundry execution challenges, market share loss

entities.name: Scale AI (Post-Meta)
entities.description: Data labeling leader. $29B valuation. Meta 49% stake. Alexandr Wang joined Meta as Chief AI Officer.
entities.catalyst: Scale Labs research division, Meta integration

entities.name: DeepSeek
entities.description: Chinese AI lab. R1 model most popular on Hugging Face. 41% of HF downloads from China.

entities.name: Neuralink
entities.description: Brain-computer interface. 12 patients implanted. $650M funding Jun 2025. Mass production planned 2026.
entities.red_flags: Regulatory hurdles, safety concerns, competition from China

entities.name: Paradromics
entities.description: Brain-computer interface competitor. FDA approved first long-term clinical trial. Speech restoration focus.

entities.name: Inference Market ($50B+)
entities.description: AI inference market growing to $50B+ in 2026. 2/3 of all AI compute now inference vs training.

entities.name: Rocket Lab
entities.description: Launch + Space Systems. $1.85B backlog (+73% YoY). $602M revenue 2025. $816M SDA contract. Neutron development.
entities.catalyst: Neutron first flight, SDA contract execution

entities.name: Planet Labs
entities.description: Satellite imagery leader. 765% stock gain 1 year. $307.7M revenue FY2026 (+26%). $900M backlog (+80% YoY). First profitable year.
entities.red_flags: Already significant run-up, Middle East imagery restrictions

entities.name: BlackSky Technology
entities.description: Real-time satellite intelligence. $100M+ 7-year contract. Gen-3 35cm resolution. AI-enabled analytics.

entities.name: Spire Global
entities.description: Satellite data/IoT. $151B SHIELD IDIQ contract access. RF geolocation capability. Debt-free. 50%+ revenue guidance 2026.
entities.red_flags: Small cap, revenue volatility post-maritime divestiture

entities.name: Relativity Space
entities.description: 3D-printed rockets. Terran R late 2026 debut. 33,500kg LEO capacity. Mars mission planned. Cape Canaveral pad construction.

entities.name: Firefly Aerospace
entities.description: Alpha rocket + lunar missions. $420-450M revenue guidance 2026. L3Harris 20-launch deal. NASA INCUS contract.
entities.catalyst: Alpha Block II, Blue Ghost lunar missions

entities.name: Astroscale
entities.description: Space debris removal leader. ADRAS-J mission success. End-of-Life services. ESA contracts.
entities.catalyst: Active debris removal contracts, regulatory push

entities.name: Impulse Space
entities.description: In-space transportation. Mars mission partnership with Relativity. Orbital maneuvering vehicles.

entities.name: Axiom Space
entities.description: Commercial space station modules. NASA ISS successor partner. Private astronaut missions.

entities.name: Vast
entities.description: Commercial space station developer. Haven-1 planned. Alternative to Axiom approach.

entities.name: Ginkgo Bioworks
entities.description: Synthetic biology platform. Cell programming. Biosecurity division. Foundry model.
entities.red_flags: SPAC legacy, path to profitability unclear

entities.name: Synchron
entities.description: Brain-computer interface via blood vessels. Less invasive than Neuralink. FDA clinical trials.

entities.name: Redwire Corporation
entities.description: Space infrastructure and manufacturing. In-space 3D printing. NASA contracts.

entities.name: Momentus
entities.description: In-space transportation. Last-mile delivery for satellites. Vigoride vehicles.

entities.name: Umbra
entities.description: SAR satellite imagery. All-weather, day-night imaging. Defense and commercial.

entities.name: Capella Space
entities.description: SAR imagery. High-resolution synthetic aperture radar. 24/7 monitoring capability.

entities.name: ICEYE
entities.description: Finnish SAR satellite leader. Largest SAR constellation. Insurance, defense clients.

entities.name: Astra Space
entities.description: Small launch provider. Pivoted to spacecraft/propulsion. Restructuring ongoing.
entities.red_flags: Launch failures, strategic pivot, cash burn

entities.name: ABL Space Systems
entities.description: Containerized launch system. RS1 rocket. Rapid deployment capability for defense.

entities.name: Isar Aerospace
entities.description: European small launch. Spectrum rocket. German space champion. ESA contracts.
entities.catalyst: First orbital launch, European sovereignty push

entities.name: Ondo Finance
entities.description: RWA tokenization leader. $2.75B TVL. USDY $1B+, OUSG $692M. Tokenized equities $500M (50% market share). Ondo Global Markets $6.8B volume.

entities.name: Centrifuge
entities.description: RWA protocol. $1.45B TVL. Janus Henderson partnership. Private credit on-chain. $100B TVL target by EOY 2026.
entities.red_flags: Smart contract risk, institutional adoption pace

entities.name: Maple Finance
entities.description: Institutional DeFi lending. $2.7B TVL. $12B+ loans originated. 99% repayment rate. 417% TVL growth 2025.

entities.name: Ethena
entities.description: Synthetic stablecoin USDe. $6.6B TVL. 3rd largest stablecoin. Fee switch pending governance. Gas-free via Safe.
entities.red_flags: Negative funding rates, 1.18% reserve ratio, 300M token unlock Apr 2026

entities.name: Morpho
entities.description: DeFi lending optimizer. $3.9B TVL (+38% YTD). Morpho Blue protocol. Institutional-grade.

entities.name: Aave
entities.description: DeFi lending leader. $24.1B TVL. V4 upgrade. GHO stablecoin. Institutional adoption.
entities.red_flags: Competition from newer protocols, regulatory risk

entities.name: Chainlink
entities.description: Oracle infrastructure. CCIP cross-chain. Staking live. RWA data feeds. Essential DeFi infrastructure.
entities.catalyst: RWA adoption, CCIP growth, staking expansion

entities.name: MakerDAO / Sky
entities.description: DAI stablecoin issuer. $5B+ TVL. SubDAO ecosystem. RWA collateral expansion.

entities.name: Pendle Finance
entities.description: Yield tokenization. Separate principal/yield. Institutional yield strategies. High TVL growth.

entities.name: EigenLayer
entities.description: Restaking protocol. Largest TVL in DeFi. AVS ecosystem. Slashing mechanisms live.
entities.red_flags: Systemic risk to Ethereum, token unlock pressure

entities.name: EtherFi
entities.description: Liquid restaking leader. Maple integration for institutional lending. weETH collateral.

entities.name: Hyperliquid
entities.description: Perpetual DEX. High performance. Growing ecosystem. Ethena integration planned.

entities.name: Circle (USDC)
entities.description: USDC stablecoin issuer. IPO candidato. MiCA compliant. Institutional standard.

entities.name: Securitize
entities.description: Tokenization infrastructure. SEC-registered. BlackRock BUIDL partnership. Institutional-grade.

entities.name: BlackRock BUIDL
entities.description: Tokenized Treasury fund. Largest institutional RWA product. On-chain T-bills.

entities.name: Franklin Templeton OnChain
entities.description: FOBXX tokenized money market. On Stellar and Polygon. TradFi-DeFi bridge.

entities.name: Goldfinch
entities.description: Uncollateralized lending to emerging markets. Real-world credit. Higher yields.

entities.name: Compound
entities.description: DeFi lending pioneer. Cross-chain expansion. Institutional integrations.

entities.name: RWA Market ($15B+ TVL)
entities.description: Tokenized RWA sector. $15B TVL on Ethereum. $10T projected by 2030. 50% asset managers with strategies by EOY.

entities.name: DeFi Lending ($55B TVL)
entities.description: DeFi lending record $55B TVL. Aave, Maple, Morpho leading. Institutional adoption accelerating.

systemic_risks: 2026 e sobre execucao, nao invencao. Inference > training spend. Cerebras, SambaNova, Groq (agora NVIDIA) competem.
Anduril, Shield AI, Skydio, Epirus todos IPO candidates. Timing e valuations dependem de budget cycles.
62% do longevity funding em epigenetic reprogramming. Translation gap de mouse para human persiste.
SMRs e fusion prometem muito mas delivery timelines sao 2030+. NRC bottleneck e real.
Tokenized securities podem enfrentar enforcement. Circle IPO e indicator de regulatory clarity.
Momentus, Astra com destruicao de valor massiva. Consolidacao inevitavel. Defense pivot e survival strategy.
